sources.label: PACER
sources.description: Public Access to Court Electronic Records. Federal court filings, dockets, case documents. SDNY 1:25-cv-08520 (Doe v. Bank of America) is the active Wexner-Epstein-MBS litigation.

sources.label: Federal Register
sources.description: Executive orders, proclamations, agency rules, federal notices. The Bush Vesting Order 248 (Vol 7, p 9097, 1942-10-20) was filed here. Trump 278e (2025-06-13) and Bush 41-era orders are searchable.

sources.label: CourtListener
sources.description: Free searchable database of U.S. court opinions. Hasbajrami v. United States, 945 F.3d 641 (11th Cir. 2020) is on file. NAACP v. Trump (emoluments), Doe v. BofA (Wexner-Epstein) all searchable.

sources.label: OpenSecrets
sources.description: FEC filings, lobbying disclosures, dark money flow, politician net worth. The donor-class spine on the INTELLIGENCE page is the political layer of this. AIPAC, Saban, Bloomberg, Steyer, Soros, Koch all queryable here.

sources.label: USAspending.gov
sources.description: Federal contract awards, grants, loans, direct payments. Carlyle Group / United Defense / BAE Systems defense contracts are queryable. TARP bailout recipients per institution. Recovery Act / IRA funds by recipient.

sources.label: FEC.gov
sources.description: Raw FEC filings: Form 3 (House), Form 3P (Presidential), Schedule A (contributions), Schedule B (disbursements). The rawest layer of the donor-class spine.

sources.label: DOJ Office of Inspector General
sources.description: DOJ OIG reports on FBI/DOJ conduct. Epstein death investigation 466-page report (Dec 2023) and follow-up reports filed here. Watchdog source for prosecutorial apparatus.

sources.label: UN OHCHR
sources.description: UN Human Rights Council + Office of the High Commissioner. Libya slave markets 2017, Khashoggi murder 2018, drone strike civilian casualty reporting. Non-Aligned bloc source.

sources.label: Congress.gov
sources.description: Public Law 119-48 (Epstein Files Transparency Act, signed Nov 19 2025), H.R. 4405, 28 Pages declassified July 15 2016, JASTA PL 114-222, all searchable here.

sources.label: White House Briefing Room
sources.description: Executive orders, proclamations, press briefings, fact sheets. Bondi→Patel letter (DOJ-OGR-23494, Feb 27 2025) is the trigger for the current EFTA release. Trump 278e (2025-06-13) filed here.

high_priority: PACER SDNY 1:25-cv-08520 (Doe v. Bank of America) — active Wexner-Epstein-MBS litigation
CourtListener Hasbajrami 945 F.3d 641 — 11th Cir NSA Section 215 unlawful
OpenSecrets AIPAC 2024 cycle — donor-class spine validation
USAspending TARP bailout recipients 2008-2010 — Bush-Obama-Carlyle pipeline
FEC Schedule B Bloomberg / Steyer / Soros / Saban — top 100 individual disbursements
scrape_targets.rate_limits: varies per source, see individual source notes
